title: Billie Jean
why_this_song: Narrative storytelling in past simple + repeated denial chorus. A2 challenge: follow a short story told in tense.

vocab_hooks.note: verb — to say something is true

grammar_callouts: past simple narration: she said, I was
'but the kid is not my son' — present simple denial

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She said I am the one
Just the smell of sweet perfume
But the kid is not my son

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Billie Jean" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Billie Jean" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Billie Jean" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Billie Jean", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Billie Jean" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Billie Jean" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Classic storytelling structure — setup, conflict, denial. Pair with a creative-writing exercise: retell the story from Billie Jean's perspective.

lines: But the kid is not my son
For 40 days and for 40 nights, I was on her side
But who can stand when she's in demand? Her schemes and plans
But the kid is not my son
Billie Jean is not my lover, uh
She's just a girl who claims that I am the one (oh, baby)
